title: Charred Ethiopian Beef Tibs
description: A traditional Ethiopian dish made with charred beef, onions, and spices, perfect for a post-workout meal due to its high protein content and low glycemic index.

ingredients.name: beef strips
ingredients.notes: such as ribeye or sirloin, cut into thin strips

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: such as fleur de sel or kosher salt

instructions: Heat a large skillet or wok over high heat, then add the vegetable oil and swirl it around to coat the pan.
Add the beef strips and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until charred and cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Remove the beef from the pan and set it aside, then add the sliced onion and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until it starts to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pan and cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
